texto: Well, we like to let down our hair and pep it up at the dances, but we keep it slower when we broadcast. We have to please everybody, and that softer music appeals to the larger amount of people. It's like eating too much cake. You have to have your steak too.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Vaughn Monroe: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Well, we like to let down our hair and pep it up at the dances, but we keep it slower when we bro…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, hair, cake pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e cake.

frase_original: Well, we like to let down our hair and pep it up at the dances, but we keep it slower when we broadcast. We have to please everybody, and that softer music appeals to the larger amount of people. It's like eating too much cake. You have to have your steak too.
